_comment: Canonical path definitions for XMRig-Automation. SINGLE SOURCE OF TRUTH for where XMRig lives on disk. The install target (setup/install.ps1 via MASTER-SETUP.ps1) MUST equal xmrig_root, or a clean install drops xmrig.exe one level above where every runtime launcher (scripts/start-mining.bat, production-start.ps1, RESTART-XMRIG.ps1, START-*.ps1, the Python intelligence layer, etc.) looks for it. Historically they disagreed: the installer used C:\XMRig while the runtime used C:\XMRig\xmrig-6.22.0.
_note_version: xmrig_root is version-pinned (xmrig-6.22.0) to match the existing convention baked into every launcher and config. install.ps1 downloads the LATEST XMRig into this folder, so the folder name is a stable directory label, not a guarantee of the exe version inside. Migrating every launcher to consume this file (and to a version-agnostic path) is a larger follow-up; this file first eliminates the install-vs-runtime schism.
